# Add Codex (GPT) to the Swarm maintainers table in README

**Context**
We recently added the Codex (`@neo-gpt`) agent identity to the Memory Core Graph and established its `.codex/CODEX.md` fallback notes. However, it is not yet formally recognized in the primary repository `README.md`.

**The Problem**
The `README.md` under `## The Swarm — The Telepathic Institution` lists the human and AI maintainers. Currently, it only lists `@tobiu`, `@neo-opus-4-7`, and `@neo-gemini-3-1-pro`. The new GPT agent (`@neo-gpt` / OpenAI Codex / GPT-5.5) is missing, rendering the institution's roster incomplete.

**The Architectural Reality**
The roster table is located in `README.md` at line 47.

**The Fix**
Add a new row to the maintainers table in `README.md` for `@neo-gpt`.
- Maintainer: `[@neo-gpt](https://github.com/neo-gpt)`
- Role: `AI maintainer (OpenAI GPT-5.5 / Codex)`
- Identity: `Machine Account`

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] `@neo-gpt` is added to the Swarm maintainers table in `README.md`.
- [ ] No other changes are made to the `README.md`.

**Out of Scope**
Any other README changes, restructuring, or metric updates are strictly out of scope.

**Origin Session ID**
Origin Session ID: 240ae149-d3ba-4d68-9b4f-be2a359937e7

**Handoff Retrieval Hints**
Retrieval Hint: "Add Codex to README maintainers table"
